Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Towing to get the job done right.

“Had a blowout on the BA Expressway at 2am. Summit had a truck to me in 12 minutes flat. Operator changed my spare in the rain so I wouldn't have to pay for a tow. These guys are Tulsa's finest.”

Marcus T. Emergency Towing
Mar 15, 2025

“They transported my Indian Scout from the dealer to my Brookside home with perfect care. Used the right straps and even covered it without me asking when rain started. Will use them for all my bike transport needs.”

Danielle K. Motorcycle Recovery
Feb 28, 2025

“Our dump truck slid off an icy job site near 71st and Memorial. Summit's rotator had it back on the road in under an hour. Their operator knew exactly how to position without tearing up the muddy yard. Professional through and through.”

Robert L. Heavy Duty Towing
Jan 17, 2025

“Locked my toddler and keys in the car outside the Gathering Place playground. Summit's guy arrived in 18 minutes and got us in without a scratch. Calm under pressure when I was panicking - worth every penny.”

Sarah M. Roadside Assistance
Nov 5, 2024

“Shipped my restored '68 Camaro to Barrett-Jackson in Phoenix. Summit's enclosed trailer was climate controlled and driver sent me photos at every stop. Car arrived cleaner than when it left my garage in Cherry Street.”

James P. Long Distance Transport
Oct 22, 2024

“Hit black ice and ended up in a ditch near 41st and Yale. Tow operator brought me coffee while waiting for the wrecker and explained exactly how they'd recover my truck without more damage. These guys treat you like family.”

Tyrone W. Emergency Towing
Dec 30, 2024
Summit Towing

Trusted towing professionals serving Tulsa, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
